content.text: How can I apply a conditional selection (like tf.where) when my input data is structured using nested Python tuples?
If one of the elements within a nested tuple pair is not an instance of tf.Tensor but a standard Python scalar, will the function throw an error?

Yes, if it encounters anything that isn't a tensor at the terminal level (after recursion finishes processing tuples), it will raise an exception because the final `else` block only allows tensors or tuples.
Thanks for explaining how this structure works!
